chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-542 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case 02.10.2025 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for petitioner Mr. K.B Chohan, Advocate for respondents No.3&4 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General ************** Counsel for the petitioner seeks disposal of the instant Constitution Petition, submitting that directions be issued to the respondents for deciding the petitioner’s case in light of judgment dated 10.07.2025, passed by the Honourable Supreme Court of Pakistan in Civil Petition No.616-K of 2025. Counsel for the respondents as well as the learned AAG have conceded to the same. Accordingly, the present Constitution Petition stands disposed of with directions to the respondents to decide the petitioner’s case within thirty days, keeping in view the aforesaid judgment, and to submit a compliance report before this Court through the Additional Registrar for perusal. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
